zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas於1393年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利安迪洛法福時，他的父親Nicolas ap Philip36歲，母親Jonet verch Gruffudd25歲。他於1419年與Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn在菲律賓波霍爾度洛馬維結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1461年2月1日在英國賀福爾莫特梅斯 克羅斯享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas于1393年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利安迪洛法福时，他的父亲Nicolas ap Philip36岁，母亲Jonet verch Gruffudd25岁。他于1419年与Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn在菲律宾波霍爾度洛馬維结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1461年2月1日在英国賀福爾莫特梅斯 克羅斯享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .
English: variant of   Pape   1.

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Nicolas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alberto, Angelito, Emilio, Fernando, Francisco, Manuel, Mario, Ricardo, Rodolfo, Ruben, Alfredo, Angel.  French Luc, Pierre, Andre, Georges, Jacques, Marcellin, Yves, Adrien, Alain, Camille, Celina, Dominique.

Spanish (Nicolás), French, Walloon, Breton, and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the personal name Nicolás (Spanish), Nicolas (French, Breton), from Greek Nikolaos (see Nicholas ). In France, this surname is most common in Brittany.
English (southern England and Glamorgan): variant of   Nicholas  .

variants.name: Nicole
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Elzear.
French: from the personal name Nicole, feminine form of Nicolas .
English (Middlesex): variant of   Nichol  .

variants.name: Loesel
meanings: German (Lösel): from a pet form of the personal name Nikolaus, German form of Nicolas .

variants.name: Nykiel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Zbigniew, Stanislaw.
Polish: from the personal name Nicolaus, the Latin form of Nicolas (Polish Mikołaj), or a Polonized form of German Nickel .

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: English (southwestern England and south Wales) and Dutch: from the personal name Nicholas (from Latin Nicolaus, from Greek Nikolaos, from nikān ‘to conquer’ + laos ‘people’). Forms with -ch- are due to hypercorrection (compare Anthony ). The name in various vernacular forms was popular among Christians throughout Europe in the Middle Ages, largely as a result of the fame of a 4th-century Lycian bishop, about whom a large number of legends grew up, and who was venerated in the Orthodox Church as well as the Catholic. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ), Greek Papanikolaou ‘(son of) Nicholas the priest’ and Nikolopoulos . Compare Nickolas .

History: The colonial official and revolutionary patriot Robert Carter Nicholas was from a prominent VA family on both sides. His father was a British navy surgeon who emigrated c. 1700 from Lancashire, England, to Williamsburg, VA.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Griffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Gruffud
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Anglicized form of   Gruffudd .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas was born in 1393, in Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Nicolas ap Philip, was 36 and his mother, Jonet verch Gruffudd, was 25. He married Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn in 1419, in Mawi, Duero, Bohol, Philippines. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 1 February 1461, in Mortimers Cross, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas est né en 1393, à Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicolas ap Philip, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Jonet verch Gruffudd, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn en 1419, à Mawi, Duero, Bohol, Philippines. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 1 février 1461, à Mortimers Cross, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas 1393 in Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicolas ap Philip 36 und seine Mutter Jonet verch Gruffudd 25. Er hat 1419 in Mawi, Duero, Bohol, Philippinen Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Februar 1461 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Mortimers Cross, Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas è nato il nel 1393 nel Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicolas ap Philip, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Jonet verch Gruffudd, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn nel 1419, nel Mawi, Duero, Bohol, Filippine. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 1 febbraio 1461, nel Mortimers Cross, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolasが1393年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランデロファウルで生まれた時，父Nicolas ap Philipは36歳，母Jonet verch Gruffuddは25歳であった。1419年にフィリピンボhオルダエロマウィでMabli verch Maredudd Dwnnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1461年2月1日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアモーティメルズ クロスで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas(이)가 1393년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랜디로파르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicolas ap Philip(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Jonet verch Gruffudd(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1419년 필리핀 보홀 드로 마위에서 Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1461년 2월 1일 영국 허퍼드실르 모르팀르스 크로스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas nasceu em 1393, em Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicolas ap Philip, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Jonet verch Gruffudd, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn em 1419, em Mawi, Duero, Bohol, Filipinas. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1461, em Mortimers Cross, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas родился в 1393 г. в местности лландилофар, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicolas ap Philip было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Jonet verch Gruffudd, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn в 1419 г. в местности мави, дуиро, бохол, Филиппины. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 1 февраля 1461 г. в местности мортимирс кросс, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas nació en 1393, en Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicolas ap Philip, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Jonet verch Gruffudd, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn en 1419, en Mawi, Duero, Bohol, Filipinas. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 1 de febrero de 1461, en Mortimers Cross, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
